name: q-recruit
description: Quickback example — hiring pipeline demo. See https://quickback.dev

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply q-recruit-auth --local && wrangler d1 migrations apply q-recruit-features --local && wrangler d1 migrations apply q-recruit-webhooks --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply q-recruit-auth --remote && wrangler d1 migrations apply q-recruit-features --remote && wrangler d1 migrations apply q-recruit-webhooks --remote
